subject: Dr. Gero, an elderly humanoid figure with white hair wearing a tall black hat and white lab coat, flanked by large glowing pink energy spheres
description: An elderly humanoid figure with white hair stands wearing a distinctive tall black hat and white lab coat. Two large glowing pink-red energy spheres flank the figure on either side, their light casting a magenta tint across the scene. The figure has a calculating, menacing expression. The background suggests a laboratory or industrial setting rendered in pinks and purples. The tall black hat is the most distinctive visual identifier. The overall composition frames the scientist as controller of dangerous power.
foreground: elderly figure with white hair, tall black hat, white lab coat, flanked by large glowing pink orbs
background: pink and purple laboratory or industrial environment
